grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use the System to operate a hotel at specified location
grant_and_term.reserved_rights: Franchisor reserves all rights not expressly granted, including right to own/operate/franchise any business anywhere
grant_and_term.restricted_area: Optional Restricted Area Provision, time-limited, excludes other Hilton brands

fee_obligations.electronic_payment: May require wire transfer or ACH
fee_obligations.set_off: Franchisor may reduce payments/credits by amounts owed
fee_obligations.interest_on_overdue: 18% per annum or maximum lawful rate

construction_requirements.architect_approval: Must obtain franchisor written consent before retaining architect, designer, GC, major subs
construction_requirements.plans_approval: Must obtain approval of plans, layouts, specs, drawings, designs before starting construction
construction_requirements.no_changes_without_consent: Cannot make changes to approved plans without advance consent
construction_requirements.opening_conditions: ADA compliance cert, all FA conditions met, staff trained, government authorization, all fees paid
construction_requirements.refurbishment: Franchisor may periodically require modernization/upgrade to current Standards at franchisee cost
construction_requirements.room_changes: Cannot change room count without approval, Room Addition Fee, and FA amendment

training_obligations.attendee_costs: Franchisee bears wages, travel, lodging, food

transfer_restrictions.franchisor_may_transfer: Without consent if assignee assumes obligations
transfer_restrictions.franchisee_permitted_transfers: Publicly traded equity, private <50% no control change, institutional funds (no notice needed). Affiliates, family, trust, death (60-day notice, consent, $5,500 fee)
transfer_restrictions.coo_transfers: $150,000 fee, full application process, current FA required, PIP compliance

noncompete.during_term: Cannot directly/indirectly own or be licensor/franchisor of competing hotel brand. May own minority interest, be franchisee, or manage for Competitor under conditions.

guaranty.scope: Unconditional and irrevocable guaranty of ALL sums owed and ALL obligations under FA and related agreements
guaranty.waivers: Guarantor waives right to require action against franchisee first, subrogation rights, exhaustion of remedies
guaranty.indemnification: Guarantor must defend and indemnify franchisor
guaranty.financial_disclosure: Must provide financial information on request

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_site_reuse: $13,000 per approved room (if terminated before opening and site reused within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_before_2yr: Greater of (60 × avg monthly royalty) or ($13,000 × rooms)

dispute_resolution.venue: E.D. Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County VA state court, or New York NY
dispute_resolution.franchisor_venue: May sue where hotel is located
dispute_resolution.puerto_rico: Arbitration (AAA/JAMS), venue Fairfax County VA, seat New York NY

jury_waiver.waiver: WAIVER OF JURY TRIAL AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES — both parties waive right to jury trial and to claim punitive or exemplary damages

general_release.trigger: Required at time of transfer (COO) or re-licensing
general_release.scope: Release of all claims, demands, damages arising on or before the effective date
general_release.state_overrides: Maryland, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Washington — release may not apply to state franchise law claims

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify, defend, hold harmless franchisor and all affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents
indemnification.notice_requirement: 5 days written notice of any action involving an Indemnified Party
indemnification.separate_counsel: Franchisor may obtain separate counsel at franchisee expense if interests conflict
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Indemnified Parties not required to mitigate losses

insurance_requirements.scope: Must maintain minimum levels and types per Manual
insurance_requirements.failure_remedy: If franchisee fails to maintain, franchisor may obtain at franchisee's cost

force_majeure.condemnation: Must immediately inform franchisor; may terminate FA, releases liquidated damages
force_majeure.casualty: Must inform immediately; hotel must reopen within 18 months; if elect not to rebuild, may terminate without liquidated damages if no competing hotel at site within 3 years
force_majeure.no_term_extension: Neither condemnation nor casualty extends the term

distinctive_clauses.description: General economic downturn or franchisee's financial inability is NOT a defense to breach claims
All data generated by or stored in required systems — franchisor has independent access with no contractual limitations
Any negotiated modifications to FA terms are confidential
Extensive OFAC/anti-corruption representations with ongoing compliance monitoring and inspection rights
Termination of any Hotel Agreement based on franchisee breach triggers non-curable default
